name: Gray Surge
description: The Edolas version of Gray. He's the opposite of the Earthland Gray in almost every way. As opposed to Earthland's Gray, the Edolas Gray is constantly putting clothes on. He has unrequited love for the Edolas Juvia, when in Earthland, Juvia is in love with Gray. The Edolas Gray often speaks with very "cutesy" words, and is easily frightened, whereas the Earthland Gray is usually very serious, and almost never runs away from a fight.
